short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $3.03B in FY2026 Q1, +20.7% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $11B — in cyclical drawdown.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 55.1% across 8 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 8 dates spanning 90–608 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±27.4% ($116.36 – $204.14).
209-day implied move: ±41.2% ($94.17 – $226.33) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $205 (+27.9% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Flat term structure (+3.9pp) — no near-term event premium; long-dated vol fairly priced.
long_term.strategy: Long 6-month put at $160 strike (ATM). High IV (51%) is expensive but downtrend justifies hedging; protects portfolio if cycle deteriorates further. Roll quarterly to maintain protection.
